title: alternanthera diffusa
intro: Alternanthera diffusa, also known as Kalanum or Cheegu, is a tropical plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alternanthera diffusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and pastes, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
